dsl_rule.translation_notes: Belt Hold is a reversal pattern that appears in uptrends. Entry conditions: (1) black candle (close < open), (2) opens near/at high (approximated by open >= high threshold), (3) tall body relative to ATR. The uptrend context is captured by targeting TRENDING_UP regime. Exit on close above open (reversal of pattern). The low success rates in parameters suggest this is a weak signal, reflected in conservative 2% stop loss and 5-day hold max.

source_rule_text: Belt Hold candlestick: A single candleline in an upward price trend where price opens at the high and closes near the low, creating a tall black candle.
